title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
summary: Here’s what happened in crypto today
briefing: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

title: CFTC officials who questioned prediction markets were suspended: NYT
summary: CFTC officials who questioned prediction markets were suspended: NYT
briefing: A New York Times investigation found that senior CFTC officials who raised concerns about Polymarket, Crypto.com and Gemini were suspended and pushed out.

title: Blockchain researcher defends Ethereum Foundation, says it’s ‘exactly’ doing its job
summary: Blockchain researcher defends Ethereum Foundation, says it’s ‘exactly’ doing its job
briefing: William Mougayar says critics are measuring the Ethereum Foundation by the wrong standard, claiming it was never meant to pump ETH or court institutions.

title: Why is Bitcoin falling despite pro-crypto Kevin Warsh becoming Fed chair?
summary: Why is Bitcoin falling despite pro-crypto Kevin Warsh becoming Fed chair?
briefing: Rising short-term bond yields and Warsh's hawkish comments in the past are reviving fears of a December rate hike, which could slam the brakes on Bitcoin's recovery.

title: Euro and USD stablecoins depeg amid ongoing $2.8M StablR exploit
summary: Euro and USD stablecoins depeg amid ongoing $2.8M StablR exploit

title: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
summary: 70% of all crypto wrench attacks happen in France: Report
briefing: Centralized data collection is a honeypot for hackers and organized criminals looking to target crypto holders and their families, according to Bitcoiners.

title: Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
summary: Analysts forecast a Bitcoin crash to the $60K level, revisiting 2026 low
briefing: The price of Bitcoin is about $75,800 at the time of publication, a nearly 40% decrease from the all-time high of about $126,000 reached in October 2025.

title: Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst
summary: Warsh will cut rates, despite consensus view of rate hikes: Analyst
briefing: The current Federal Funds target rate is between 350 and 375 basis points, which traders project to rise by at least 25 basis points in December 2026.

title: Firefox's Big Redesign Gives You a Button to Kill All the AI
summary: Firefox's Big Redesign Gives You a Button to Kill All the AI
briefing: Project Nova is coming later this year with a cleaner look, compact mode, and a toggle to make AI features disappear entirely.

summary: Bitcoin Dives Below $75K for First Time in a Month as Crypto Liquidations Near $1 Billion
